title: Building AI Agents for Real-World Problems & Workflows
summary: Shailaja Patel-Pranav discusses how AI agents operate in real-world systems, emphasizing the differences between research and production environments. The video covers agent orchestration, task coordination, policy enforcement, and alignment with human decision-making in workflow automation contexts.
writeup: Shailaja Patel-Pranav examines how AI agents function inside real-world systems, drawing a line between research settings and production environments. The discussion covers agent orchestration, task coordination, policy enforcement, and keeping agent behavior aligned with human decision-making across workflow automation. The throughline: moving agents from experiments to deployed systems shifts the priorities toward coordination and control.
